description:
Convert fixed-time traffic signals to actuated control for the Bologna Pasubio transit corridor using the scenario files at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/. Update the traffic light configuration at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio_tls.add.xml by setting all <tlLogic> types to 'actuated' and adding minDur (50% of duration, min 5) and maxDur (150% of duration) attributes to each phase (rounded to the nearest integer), without modifying any phase states. After running the simulation with /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run.sumocfg, generate a summary report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/bus_travel_times.txt based on the trip-info data in /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/tripinfos.xml. The report must list the number of completed bus trips (IDs containing 'bus'), average duration, and average waiting time in seconds, formatted as:
bus_trips_completed: <N>
avg_duration_s: <X.XX>
avg_waitingTime_s: <X.XX>
Optionally, include a per-trip table below the summary.
